items.title: I'm excited to read everybody's thoughts on what (if any) lessons to take from the Knicks winning, because the main one I've got is basic: If you're very good but not quite there, don't rush to the drastic. Iterate, stay very good, give yourself a chance if things break right.
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: I'm excited to read everybody's thoughts on what (if any) lessons to take from the Knicks winning, because the main one I've got is basic: If you're very good but not quite there, don't rush to the drastic. Iterate, stay very good, give yourself a chance if things break right.

items.title: Hollinger POTD Rick Brunson. Temple PG was undrafted in 97 but made POR. Per bio: "a poor man's Mark Jackson." Good passer & liked by coaches. Played w/8 different teams thru 06. Usually a 10th man but got some run. Largest role was w/LAC in 04-05 (24 mpg, 5 ppg, 5 apg).

items.title: From pain comes perseverance. From frustration comes fight. From disappointment comes determination.
items.author: Jeff McDonald
items.body_excerpt:
From pain comes perseverance. From frustration comes fight. From disappointment comes determination.

After a magical season gone up in smoke like a puff from Jeremy Sochan's victory cigar, that is the Spurs' hope anyway.

On what comes next for Wembanyama, Spurs:
www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: How the Spurs hope to gain fuel from Knicks' title celebration
media.description: “I hope it leads to them being hungrier than they've ever been,” Mitch Johnson said.
